scenarios.description: valueOf with preserveCase true and mixed-case tag triggers clone path before isFormSubmittable
scenarios.precondition: Parser.NamespaceHtml initialized; Tag static map populated
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a new Tag instance with tagName='DiV' and isFormSubmittable()==false
pseudocode: Tag cloned = Tag.valueOf(tagName, normalName, ns, settings);

scenarios.description: valueOf with null ParseSettings throws NullPointerException before isFormSubmittable
scenarios.path: B0→B1(tagName ok)→B2(not empty)→B3(not null ns)→B4(Tags.get(tagName) succeed)→B5(settings.preserveTagCase NPE)
scenarios.precondition: Parser.NamespaceHtml initialized; Tag static map populated

scenarios.description: valueOf full-overload returns static known tag and isFormSubmittable true for 'input'
scenarios.path: B0→B1(trim)→B2(not empty)→B3(not null ns)→B4(Tags.get(tagName) found & ns match)→B6(return)
scenarios.precondition: Parser.NamespaceHtml initialized; Tag static map populated
scenarios.expectedResult: returns same static Tag for 'input' and isFormSubmittable()==true
pseudocode: Tag tag = Tag.valueOf(tagName, normalName, ns, settings);
